request.description:
Upload a JWT-wrapped Verifiable Credential (ICAM v24.07 / Gaia-X Loire).

Body: compact JWT serialization (header.payload.signature).
Content-Type must be application/vc+ld+json+jwt — sending a JWT body with application/json or application/vc+ld+json returns 400.

Generate a signed test fixture:
  python3 cat-integration-tests/scripts/generate-jwt-fixture.py vc

Upload a JWT-wrapped Verifiable Presentation (ICAM v24.07 / Gaia-X Loire).

Body: compact JWT serialization (header.payload.signature).
Content-Type must be application/vp+ld+json+jwt.

Generate a signed test fixture:
  python3 cat-integration-tests/scripts/generate-jwt-fixture.py vp

body.raw: MATCH (n:ServiceOffering)-[:hasLegallyBindingAddress]->(a:Address) where a.locality = 'City Name 2' return n, a
PREFIX cred: <https://www.w3.org/2018/credentials#> SELECT ?s ?p ?o ?cs WHERE { << ?s ?p ?o >> cred:credentialSubject ?cs } LIMIT 100
